mapper.select: SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE is_active = 1 AND account_kind = 'REAL' AND ( owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} OR (owner_family_id IS NOT NULL AND owner_family_id = #{ownerFamilyId}) ) ORDER BY account_name
SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE parent_account_id = #{parentAccountId} AND is_active = 1

SELECT a.* FROM accounts a LEFT JOIN accounts b ON a.id = b.parent_account_id AND b.is_active = 1 WHERE a.is_active = 1 AND a.account_kind = 'REAL' AND b.id IS NULL AND ( a.owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} OR (a.owner_family_id IS NOT NULL AND a.owner_family_id = #{ownerFamilyId}) )
SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE is_active = 1 AND account_kind = 'REAL' AND linked_product_id = #{productId} AND parent_account_id IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO accounts ( account_code, account_name, account_kind, account_type, account_subtype, virtual_subtype, owner_type, owner_user_id, owner_family_id, currency, parent_account_id, linked_product_id, initial_shares, is_fixed_amount, fixed_amount, fund_usage, balance, reserved_amount, initial_balance, is_active, note, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{accountCode}, #{accountName}, #{accountKind}, #{accountType}, #{accountSubtype}, #{virtualSubtype}, #{ownerType}, #{ownerUserId}, #{ownerFamilyId}, #{currency}, #{parentAccountId}, #{linkedProductId}, #{initialShares}, #{isFixedAmount}, #{fixedAmount}, #{fundUsage}, #{balance}, #{reservedAmount}, #{initialBalance}, #{isActive}, #{note}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE accounts SET account_code = #{accountCode}, account_name = #{accountName}, account_type = #{accountType}, account_subtype = #{accountSubtype}, currency = #{currency}, parent_account_id = #{parentAccountId}, linked_product_id = #{linkedProductId}, initial_shares = #{initialShares}, is_fixed_amount = #{isFixedAmount}, fixed_amount = #{fixedAmount}, balance = #{balance}, fund_usage = #{fundUsage}, fund_usage = NULL, initial_balance = #{initialBalance}, is_active = #{isActive}, note = #{note}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE accounts SET balance = #{balance}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE accounts SET reserved_amount = #{reservedAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE accounts SET initial_shares = #{initialShares}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
